research_question: Does a monthly fully invested capped inverse-realized-volatility allocation across SPY, QQQ and GLD improve risk-adjusted performance without a momentum or cash gate?
null_hypothesis: The inverse-volatility account has no positive risk-adjusted advantage over SPY buy-and-hold or static equal-weight SPY/QQQ/GLD.

input_identity.common_session_rule: Inspect the union inside the three-symbol overlap before forming the exact common-session panel; any union date missing a symbol blocks. No forward fill or calendar substitution.
input_identity.row_rule: Every symbol-date key is unique and every required price is finite and strictly positive.
input_identity.minimum_history_rule: At least 61 exact common sessions are required before a decision so the estimator contains 60 close-to-close returns.
input_identity.consumed_common_session_hash: SHA256 of ordered trade_date then SPY,QQQ,GLD raw_open,adj_open,adj_close values

strategy.decision: final exact common source session of each calendar month at close
strategy.execution: immediately next exact common source session at open
strategy.volatility_formula: sample standard deviation ddof=1 of 60 adj_close close-to-close returns ending at the decision close
strategy.cap_redistribution: Iteratively fix weights above 0.60 and redistribute all remaining weight pro rata to inverse-volatility scores of uncapped assets until weights sum to one.
strategy.forbidden_features: no trend filter, momentum signal, asset selection, intentional cash, volatility target, covariance optimizer, leverage or shorting

accounting.rebalance: At each execution open sell every existing position once at its adjusted-open-ratio marked value, then rebuild the three-asset target basket.
accounting.buy_shares: For post-sale cash C, buy floor(weight_i * C / (raw_open_i * (1 + one_way_cost_rate))) shares independently for SPY, QQQ and GLD.
accounting.residual_cash: Only whole-share and explicit-cost residual cash is permitted; it earns zero return and is not a strategic target.
accounting.terminal_liquidation: Sell every remaining position exactly once on the final accepted split session; no terminal rebalance.
accounting.one_way_turnover: sum of executed notionals divided by account NAV immediately before the trade
accounting.cost_drag: sum of explicit transaction costs in USD divided by initial capital
accounting.whole_share_cash_utilization: executed raw purchase notional divided by post-sale available cash

splits.complete_interval_rule: decision, entry and next-rebalance exit must all be inside one split; cross-split and terminally incomplete intervals are purged
splits.combined: concatenate validation then holdout daily net-return streams without resetting the peak; each split retains its own initial purchase and terminal liquidation

comparators.B1_SPY_BUY_HOLD: whole-share SPY bought at first split raw open and liquidated at final split adjusted-open-ratio value
comparators.B2_STATIC_EQUAL_WEIGHT_SPY_QQQ_GLD: three independent USD 40000/3 whole-share buy-and-hold legs
comparators.B3_DUAL_MOMENTUM_CASH: recompute the merged frozen 252-session top-one positive-momentum cash-gate rule; do not read its prior result
comparators.B4_INVERSE_VOLATILITY: the frozen monthly fully invested capped inverse-volatility account

lineage_distinction.US46: Rejected US46 is fixed 50/50 QQQ/GLD with no SPY or volatility-conditioned weights and remains closed.
lineage_distinction.dual_momentum: Merged dual momentum selects one asset or cash from a 252-session signal; this strategy always allocates across all three assets from only 60-session realized volatility.

tests: validation B4 Sharpe minus B1 Sharpe > 0
validation B4 Sharpe minus B2 Sharpe > 0
holdout B4 Sharpe minus B1 Sharpe > 0
holdout B4 Sharpe minus B2 Sharpe > 0
inference.resampling: paired chronological circular blocks concatenated and truncated to N
inference.centered_statistic: bootstrap Sharpe difference minus observed Sharpe difference
inference.pass_rule: Every Holm-adjusted p is at most 0.025 and every Holm simultaneous lower bound is strictly positive.

primary_gates: holdout B4 daily maximum drawdown is less severe than both B1 and B2
holdout B4 Calmar is strictly greater than both B1 and B2
combined B4 CAGR is positive and at least 50 percent of B1 CAGR
combined B4 Calmar is strictly greater than B2 Calmar
at 30 bps combined B4 CAGR > 0, B4 Calmar > B2, and largest calendar-year contribution < 40 percent
all four Holm-adjusted inference tests pass and zero input, cap, full-investment, whole-share, cost, database or output failures
stop_rule: After qualification claim exactly one outcome run. Any post-claim failure consumes the run. Do not retune, rerun, substitute data, or alter assets, window, cap, redistribution, costs, splits, inference or gates.
